zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Ferrers於1412年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素時，他的父親Edmund Ferrers26歲，母親Elene de la Roche18歲。他於大約1437年與Elizabeth Belknap在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1450年6月9日在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾凱斯頓享年38歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Ferrers was born in 1412, in Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Edmund Ferrers, was 26 and his mother, Elene de la Roche, was 18. He married Elizabeth Belknap about 1437, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 June 1450, in Keyston, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

ko.Halifax, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스 할이파스 스트 자메스
ko.lifeSummary: William De Ferrers(이)가 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 처틀리 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Ferrers(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elene de la Roche(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1437년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Elizabeth Belknap(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 6월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 케이스턴에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Ferrers родился в 1412 г. в местности чартли кастл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edmund Ferrers было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elene de la Roche, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Belknap около 1437 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 июня 1450 г. в местности кистон, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.
